# FuseAITools

> FuseAITools is an all-in-one AI platform with 100+ models for chat, image, video, and audio. Use tools in the browser with credit-based pricing; new users receive 20 free credits on sign-up. This file lists the most useful public pages for understanding our products and workflows.

FuseAITools integrates third-party and in-house models (GPT, Claude, Wan, HappyHorse, Seedream, Seedance, Veo3, Suno, ElevenLabs, and more). Each tool page includes usage controls and an SEO content section with features, FAQs, and workflow links. For a full URL list, see [sitemap.xml](https://fuseaitools.com/sitemap.xml). Crawler rules: [robots.txt](https://fuseaitools.com/robots.txt).

## Core pages

- [Home](https://fuseaitools.com/): Marketing homepage, product overview, and FAQ.
- [AI Tools Hub](https://fuseaitools.com/home): Launch pad for all integrated AI tools.
- [Pricing](https://fuseaitools.com/pricing): Subscription plans, credit top-ups, and 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [About](https://fuseaitools.com/about): Platform overview, contact, and 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [News](https://fuseaitools.com/news): Tutorials, comparisons, and product updates.

## Chat

- [GPT](https://fuseaitools.com/home/gpt): OpenAI GPT chat and generation overview.
- [GPT Generate](https://fuseaitools.com/home/gpt/generate): Multi-turn chat and content generation.
- [Claude](https://fuseaitools.com/home/claude): Anthropic Claude overview.
- [Claude Generate](https://fuseaitools.com/home/claude/generate): Claude chat workspace.
- [Gemini](https://fuseaitools.com/home/gemini): Google Gemini overview.
- [Gemini Generate](https://fuseaitools.com/home/gemini/generate): Gemini chat workspace.
- [DeepSeek](https://fuseaitools.com/home/deepseek): DeepSeek overview.
- [DeepSeek Generate](https://fuseaitools.com/home/deepseek/generate): DeepSeek chat workspace.

## Image

- [GPT Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/gpt-image): GPT image generation suite overview.
- [Ideogram Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/ideogram): V3 general image (T2I/edit/remix/reframe) + Character identity line; 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [Ideogram V3 Text to Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/ideogram/v3-text-to-image): V3—prompt, MagicPrompt, six aspect ratios, negative prompt.
- [Ideogram V3 Edit](https://fuseaitools.com/home/ideogram/v3-edit): V3—image + mask inpainting.
- [Ideogram V3 Remix](https://fuseaitools.com/home/ideogram/v3-remix): V3—strength remix, 1–4 outputs.
- [Ideogram V3 Reframe](https://fuseaitools.com/home/ideogram/v3-reframe): V3—aspect reframe without prompt.
- [Ideogram Character](https://fuseaitools.com/home/ideogram/character): Character—reference + prompt, identity lock.
- [Ideogram Character Edit](https://fuseaitools.com/home/ideogram/character-edit): Character—mask edit with reference.
- [Ideogram Character Remix](https://fuseaitools.com/home/ideogram/character-remix): Character—strength remix with reference.
- [Flux Kontext Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/flux-kontext): Black Forest Labs Flux—Kontext v1 (Pro/Max generate/edit) and Flux 2 v2 (1K/2K T2I/I2I + Pro); 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [Flux Kontext Generate](https://fuseaitools.com/home/flux-kontext/generate): v1—text-to-image and single-image edit; six aspect ratios; safety and prompt controls.
- [Flux 2 Text to Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/flux-kontext/flux-2-text-to-image): v2—prompt 3–5000 chars, 1K/2K, eight aspect ratios + auto.
- [Flux 2 Image to Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/flux-kontext/flux-2-image-to-image): v2—1–8 reference images + prompt, 1K/2K.
- [Flux 2 Pro Text to Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/flux-kontext/flux-2-pro-text-to-image): v2 Pro—higher-fidelity T2I at 1K/2K.
- [Flux 2 Pro Image to Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/flux-kontext/flux-2-pro-image-to-image): v2 Pro—multi-reference I2I with Pro-tier detail.
- [Nano Banana Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/nano-banana): Google Gemini Flash Image—T2I, I2I, Pro 4K, NB2; 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [Nano Banana Text to Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/nano-banana/generate): Prompt-only, eleven aspect ratios, PNG/JPEG, up to 5000 chars.
- [Nano Banana Image to Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/nano-banana/edit): Edit 1–10 images with natural-language prompts.
- [Nano Banana Pro Generate](https://fuseaitools.com/home/nano-banana/pro-generate): 1–10 reference images, 1K/2K/4K resolution.
- [Nano Banana 2](https://fuseaitools.com/home/nano-banana/nano-banana-2): Up to 20k prompt, optional 0–14 images, fifteen aspect ratios.
- [Seedream Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedream): ByteDance Seedream 5 Lite image tools; pairs with Seedance video; 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [Seedream 5 Lite Text to Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedream/5-lite-text-to-image): Text-to-image at 2K/3K, nine aspect ratios, prompts up to 2995 chars.
- [Seedream 5 Lite Image to Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedream/5-lite-image-to-image): Edit 1–5 images with prompts—style, lighting, or frame prep for Seedance.
- [Qwen Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/qwen): Qwen image tools overview.
- [Imagen 4](https://fuseaitools.com/home/imagen4): Google Imagen 4 overview.

## Video — HappyHorse v1

HappyHorse v1 focuses on native audio-video joint generation (lip-sync, ambient sound, multi-shot narrative).

- [HappyHorse Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/happy-horse): Four v1 workflows with native audio-video sync; 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [HappyHorse v1 Text to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/happy-horse/v1-text-to-video): Generate video from text; 3–15s, 720p/1080p, multiple aspect ratios.
- [HappyHorse v1 Image to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/happy-horse/v1-image-to-video): Animate one input image with optional prompt.
- [HappyHorse v1 Reference to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/happy-horse/v1-reference-to-video): 1–9 reference images with character placeholders.
- [HappyHorse v1 Video Edit](https://fuseaitools.com/home/happy-horse/v1-video-edit): Edit existing video with natural-language instructions.

## Video — Wan 2.6 & 2.7

Wan 2.6 covers text, image, and video-to-video (5–15s, multi-shot); Wan 2.7 adds image tools (1K/2K/4K stills), frame-controlled I2V, Video Edit, and R2V (up to 5 references). Image and video workflows cross-link on each tool page.

- [Wan Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan): Wan image and video tools hub.
- [Wan 2.6 Text to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan/text-to-video): Role-play oriented text-to-video.
- [Wan 2.6 Image to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan/image-to-video): Image-to-video with multi-shot options.
- [Wan 2.6 Video to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan/video-to-video): Upload footage and transform with prompts (5/10s output).
- [Wan 2.7 Text to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan/v2-7-text-to-video): Advanced text-to-video, 2–15s.
- [Wan 2.7 Image to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan/v2-7-image-to-video): First/last frame and driving audio controls.
- [Wan 2.7 Video Edit](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan/v2-7-video-edit): Natural-language video editing.
- [Wan 2.7 R2V](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan/v2-7-r2v): Up to 5 reference images/videos for ensemble scenes.
- [Wan 2.7 Image](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan/2-7-image): Wan 2.7 image generation.
- [Wan 2.7 Image Pro](https://fuseaitools.com/home/wan/2-7-image-pro): Wan 2.7 Image Pro (higher quality tier).

## Video — Other models

- [Veo 3.1 Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/veo3): Google DeepMind video at /home/veo3—Standard/Fast + extend; pairs with Seedance; 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [Veo 3.1 Text to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/veo3/text-to-video): Prompt-only, veo3 or veo3_fast, 16:9/9:16/Auto, up to 1000 chars.
- [Veo 3.1 First and Last Frames](https://fuseaitools.com/home/veo3/first-and-last-to-video): 1–2 keyframe images plus prompt for transition video.
- [Veo 3.1 Reference to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/veo3/reference-to-video): Animate 1–3 reference images with motion prompt.
- [Veo 3.1 Video Extend](https://fuseaitools.com/home/veo3/extend): Extend prior Veo3 clips via veo3_extend.
- [Sora](https://fuseaitools.com/home/sora): OpenAI Sora video tools overview.
- [Runway](https://fuseaitools.com/home/runway): Runway video generation overview.
- [Luma](https://fuseaitools.com/home/luma): Luma video generation overview.
- [Kling](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling): Nine Kuaishou video workflows; 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [Kling v2.5 Turbo I2V Pro](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling/v2-5-turbo-image-to-video-pro): Image-to-video with optional tail frame, CFG scale.
- [Kling v2.5 Turbo T2V Pro](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling/v2-5-turbo-text-to-video-pro): Text-to-video with 16:9/9:16/1:1 aspect ratios.
- [Kling 2.6 Text to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling/v2-6-text-to-video): Prompt-driven clips with optional sound.
- [Kling 2.6 Image to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling/v2-6-image-to-video): Animate a single image with optional sound.
- [Kling 2.6 Motion Control](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling/v2-6-motion-control): Reference image + video motion transfer at 720p/1080p.
- [Kling 3.0 Motion Control](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling/v3-0-motion-control): std/pro motion control with background source.
- [Kling AI Avatar Standard](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling/ai-avatar-standard): Talking-head video from avatar image and audio.
- [Kling AI Avatar Pro](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling/ai-avatar-pro): High-quality talking-head avatar generation.
- [Kling 3.0 Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/kling/v3-0-video): Single or multi-shot video, 3–15 seconds.

## Video — Seedance

Seedance covers ByteDance video models: v1 Lite/Pro (5/10s up to 1080p), 1.5 Pro (4/8/12s with optional audio), and Seedance 2 multimodal (4–15s, first/last frame, reference media). Pairs with Seedream for ByteDance image-to-video pipelines.

- [Seedance Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedance): Eight workflows from v1 Lite/Pro through Seedance 2; 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [Seedance v1 Lite Text to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedance/v1-lite-text-to-video): Text-to-video with 16:9–9:21 ratios, 480p–1080p, 5s/10s.
- [Seedance v1 Lite Image to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedance/v1-lite-image-to-video): Animate one image with optional end frame.
- [Seedance v1 Pro Text to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedance/v1-pro-text-to-video): Pro T2V with 21:9 ultra-wide support.
- [Seedance v1 Pro Image to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedance/v1-pro-image-to-video): Pro image animation with full controls.
- [Seedance v1 Pro Fast Image to Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedance/v1-pro-fast-image-to-video): Speed-optimized I2V at 720p/1080p.
- [Seedance 1.5 Pro](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedance/v1-5-pro): Unified T2V/I2V with optional audio, 4/8/12s.
- [Seedance 2 Fast](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedance/v2-fast): Multimodal video with up to 3 reference videos.
- [Seedance 2](https://fuseaitools.com/home/seedance/v2): Full multimodal with up to 5 reference videos.

- [Hailuo](https://fuseaitools.com/home/hailuo): Hailuo image-to-video overview.
- [Grok Video](https://fuseaitools.com/home/grok): Grok image and video tools overview.

## Audio — Suno

Suno on FuseAITools offers six music workflows—generate, extend, cover, expand, accompaniment, and vocals—with models V3.5 through V5.

- [Suno Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/suno): Six AI music workflows; 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [Suno Music Generation](https://fuseaitools.com/home/suno/generate): Text-to-music with Simple or Custom mode, V3.5–V5.
- [Suno Music Extension](https://fuseaitools.com/home/suno/extend): Extend completed generate tasks via Audio ID.
- [Suno Audio Cover](https://fuseaitools.com/home/suno/upload-cover): Reimagine uploaded audio (≤2 min) in a new style.
- [Suno Audio Expansion](https://fuseaitools.com/home/suno/upload-extend): Expand short uploaded clips into fuller tracks.
- [Suno Accompaniment](https://fuseaitools.com/home/suno/add-instrumental): Add instrumentals via include/exclude tags.
- [Suno Vocal Generation](https://fuseaitools.com/home/suno/add-vocals): Add vocals with prompts up to 5000 characters.

## Audio — ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs on FuseAITools offers five audio workflows—Multilingual v2 TTS, Turbo 2.5 TTS, Speech-to-Text, Sound Effect v2, and AI Audio Isolation.

- [ElevenLabs Overview](https://fuseaitools.com/home/elevenlabs): Five voice and audio workflows; 20 free credits on sign-up.
- [ElevenLabs Multilingual v2](https://fuseaitools.com/home/elevenlabs/multilingual-v2): Natural text-to-speech with voice controls and optional timestamps.
- [ElevenLabs Turbo 2.5](https://fuseaitools.com/home/elevenlabs/turbo-2-5): Fast TTS for low-latency narration and assistants.
- [ElevenLabs Speech-to-Text](https://fuseaitools.com/home/elevenlabs/speech-to-text): Upload audio (≤200MB) for transcripts with diarization.
- [ElevenLabs Sound Effect v2](https://fuseaitools.com/home/elevenlabs/sound-effect-v2): Generate SFX from text (0.5–22s duration).
- [ElevenLabs AI Audio Isolation](https://fuseaitools.com/home/elevenlabs/audio-isolation): Extract vocals or instruments from mixed audio (≤10MB).

## Optional

- [News index](https://fuseaitools.com/news): Article list; individual articles live under `/news/{slug}`.
- [About FuseAITools](https://fuseaitools.com/about): Support and service contacts.
